§6Gold-198§f

§aAn irradiated gold isotope — useful for advanced fuel recipes!§f

§bGold-198§f (Au-198) is a radioactive isotope of gold produced through specific irradiation processes. It is an intermediate material used in certain advanced fuel and material recipes.

§6Production§f:
Gold-198 is produced by irradiating gold in a nuclear reactor or through specific transmutation processes involving intense neutron flux.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bAdvanced Fuel Components§f — used in certain high-tier fuel recipes
§b• §bRadiological Applications§f — its radioactivity makes it useful for specialized industrial processes

§eTip§f: Gold-198 is produced in nugget form (hbm:nugget_au198). It is a stepping stone material — don't stockpile huge quantities unless you have a specific use planned. Its primary value is in accessing certain advanced fuel chains.
